movie.overview: Pierrot escapes his boring society and travels from Paris to the Mediterranean Sea with Marianne, a girl chased by hit-men from Algeria. They lead an unorthodox life, always on the run.
movie.tagline: You've met the tame Godard, the love Godard, the think Godard, ...now meet the wild Godard!
movie.title: Pierrot le Fou

results.name: Chantal Akerman on Pierrot le fou
